title: IRGC Claims Complete Hormuz Closure — CENTCOM Denies
snippet: IRGC claimed Strait of Hormuz is 'completely closed' due to US strikes on Iran. CENTCOM directly contradicted: 'Commercial ships are continuing to transit.' An information war has erupted over the actual status of the strait, with both sides presenting conflicting claims about maritime access.
tag_reason: 호르무즈 해협 완전 폐쇄 주장 vs CENTCOM 부인 — 정보전 심화
